overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant neon-lit district of Night City. The journey transitions from a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass, across open streets with towering glass buildings, through narrow commercial alleys with holographic signage, and finally approaching a massive corporate skyscraper.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the concrete overpass on a green-painted sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and food stalls

notable_agents.action: person in pink pants standing near a neon sign, facing away from camera

entered.detail: light blue compact van parked on the side of the green walkway
massive concrete highway overpass creating shadow over the walkway
distinctive green painted pedestrian surface with red markings
glowing pink and blue holographic food advertisement sign
futuristic vending kiosk with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk district. The camera follows a character walking along a distinctive green-painted sidewalk, passing a parked blue van and various pedestrians. Neon holographic signs glow against the shadowed environment, and food vendors with outdoor seating occupy the right side of the walkway.

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into bright open sunlight
crossing the street with a group of pedestrians at the yellow crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide urban street with a group of pedestrians, moving from shadow into bright sunlight

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street in the background

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective blue glass facade and circular window patterns
wide street with yellow zebra crossing lines
large industrial ventilation fans mounted on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into bright morning sunlight, transitioning to an open urban intersection. They cross the asphalt street with a group of pedestrians, passing a striking blue glass building on the left. Large industrial ventilation fans are visible on a building to the right as the camera moves through the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow commercial street lined with shops, passing under neon signs and red lanterns

entered.detail: storefront with yellow signage reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP' and orange trim
overhead neon signs spanning the street displaying '24h' and Japanese characters
traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside storefronts
futuristic standing advertisement display showing 'REAL WATER' commercial

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower commercial street lined with storefronts including the 'El Dorado Pawn Shop' on the right. Overhead neon signs and red paper lanterns create a vibrant canopy above the green-painted sidewalk. The environment feels more enclosed as buildings rise on both sides, with various holographic advertisements and closed shop shutters visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with corporate skyscraper plaza

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the towering YABA skyscraper facade

agents.ego_description: approaching a major intersection and looking up at the massive corporate skyscraper, slowing to observe the architecture

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive curved glass skyscraper with large teal 'YABA' signage near the base
large curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements
wide concrete staircase leading up to an elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow street into a major intersection dominated by the massive YABA skyscraper, a curved glass tower with prominent teal signage. The camera tilts upward to admire the building's height against the clear blue sky. Digital billboards and an outdoor staircase to an elevated walkway frame the scene as the character stops to observe the corporate architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that transitions from a shadowed underpass into the open expanse of a corporate plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, following a character along a green-painted sidewalk past glowing holographic signs and food vendors. As the character emerges from the cover of the overpass, the environment opens into a bright, sunlit intersection where the camera glides across an asphalt street past a striking blue glass building and industrial ventilation fans. The scene then shifts into a narrower commercial street, where the open sky is replaced by a vibrant canopy of red paper lanterns and neon storefronts like the El Dorado Pawn Shop. Finally, the camera breaks out of the enclosed alley into a major intersection, tilting upward to reveal the towering, curved glass facade of the YABA skyscraper against a clear blue sky.
